parsed_output.ticket: I was charged twice this month and your support team has not replied for five days. I am going to post this on social media if this is not fixed today.
parsed_output.justification: Billing dispute with escalation risk and financial impact.

parsed_output.ticket: The export button stopped working after your latest update. Our reporting team is blocked.
parsed_output.justification: Core functionality regression affecting active users.

parsed_output.ticket: Can you add approval workflows before invoices are submitted?
parsed_output.justification: Request for new workflow functionality rather than a defect.

parsed_output.ticket: We need confirmation that our customer data is not being used to train your AI models.
parsed_output.justification: Potential privacy and governance concern requiring compliance review.

parsed_output.ticket: My admin account is locked and the password reset email never arrives.
parsed_output.justification: Critical user locked out with failed recovery process.
